name: Quick Cheese Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the Velveeta cheese into small pieces and add them to a saucepan.
2. Add butter and milk to the saucepan.
3. Heat the mixture slowly until the cheese has melted.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. In a separate bowl, dissolve cornstarch in half a cup of water.
6. Gradually stir the cornstarch solution into the sauce, a little at a time, until it reaches the desired consistency.
